Schweitzer-Batzen</PRICE> zu l√ºffern, und den Subscriptions-Termin dieser zwey Wercklin bi√ü zu Ende des n√§chst-bevorstehenden Monats Junit zu verl√§ngern. The following corrections were made to the XML:
1. **PRIZE → PRICE (first instance):** The tag `<PRIZE>` and `</PRIZE>` was corrected to `<PRICE>` / `</PRICE>` for "24. sols oder 12. Schweitzer-Batzen", as PRICE is the correct semantic tag for monetary values in this schema.
2. **PRIZE → PRICE (second instance):** Same correction applied to `<PRIZE>5. Bz.</PRIZE>` → `<PRICE>5. Bz.</PRICE>`.
3. **Mismatched closing tag `</PRICE>` → corrected opening tag:** The last price tag had `<PRIZE>10. Bz.</PRICE>` — the opening tag was `PRIZE` but the closing was `PRICE`. Both are now unified as `<PRICE>10. Bz.</PRICE>`.
4. **Added `<PERSON>` tags** around "P. Paupie" and "Herr Paupie" and "Piccard" to properly mark named persons.
5. **Added `<PLACE>` tag** around "Haag" to mark the named location.
6. **Added `<OCCUPATION>` tag** around "Buchh√§ndler" to mark the professional role.
7. **Escaped ampersand:** The `&` in the title "Traitte de la Religion naturelle & revelee" was properly escaped as `&amp;` to be valid XML.
